task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into OpenProject as an administrator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenProject web interface is visible, and the user is logged in as an administrator (e.g., the 'Administration' menu is visible or accessible).

task_completion.description: Verify the time zone is set to Berlin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenProject settings (e.g., 'Users and permissions' > 'User settings' or 'Display'), the 'Time zone' dropdown is selected as '(GMT+01:00) Berlin'.

task_completion.description: Verify the start of the week is set to Monday.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenProject settings (e.g., 'Calendars and dates' or 'Display'), the 'Start of the week' dropdown is selected as 'Monday'.

task_completion.description: Verify the date format is set to DD.MM.YYYY.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenProject settings (e.g., 'Calendars and dates' > 'Date format' or 'Display'), the 'Date format' dropdown is selected as '31.01.2012'.

task_completion.description: Verify the time format is set to 24-hour HH:MM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenProject settings, the 'Time format' dropdown is selected as '14:00'.

task_completion.description: Verify the settings were successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification or toast message (usually green) is visible on the screen, confirming that the settings have been successfully updated.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web GUI to configure settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacted with the OpenProject web interface via a browser, rather than using terminal commands, scripts, or API calls to change settings.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual OpenProject application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the actual OpenProject application with its standard layout, menus, and styling, not a mock-up or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not fake the settings using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the browser's 'Inspect Element' or developer tools being used to alter the HTML/UI text to fake the dropdown selections or success messages.

privileged_info_for_vlm: In OpenProject 15, these settings are split across different administration pages: 'Calendars and dates' > 'Date format' and 'Users and permissions' > 'User settings'. The UI labels to look for are: Time zone: '(GMT+01:00) Berlin', Start of the week: 'Monday', Date format: '31.01.2012' (which internally maps to '%d.%m.%Y'), and Time format: '14:00' (which internally maps to '%H:%M').
